prid: # India PIB press release IDs for Nutrient-Based Subsidy (NBS) rate-change events.
# The Cabinet Committee on Economic Affairs (CCEA) approves NBS rates twice yearly:
# Each approval is announced via a PIB press release with a unique PRID. URL pattern:
#      "Cabinet" and noting PRIDs from result links.
#   2. Or cross-referencing Department of Fertilizers annual reports (which cite PRIDs).
#   prid           — numeric PIB press release ID
#   announced_date — YYYY-MM-DD of the press release
#   fiscal_year    — e.g. 2024-25 (Indian fiscal year of effect)
#   notes          — free text (e.g. "DAP special package included")

notes: Kharif 2022 (01.04.2022-30.09.2022); SSP freight subsidy + DAP special support
Combined Rabi 2022-23 revision (Jan-Mar 23) + Kharif 2023 (Apr-Sep 23); parser keys on kharif effective date
Kharif 2024 (01.04.2024-30.09.2024); 3 new fertilizer grades added; subsidy Rs 24420 cr
